_comment: Founding seed set - RECONSTRUCTED per the tiered structure locked in the July 2026 genesis-design session. Tier 1 values are the seven 2019 SI defining constants (exact by definition; transcribe-verified against CODATA 2022 before proposing). Tier 2 is a batch proposal per PIPELINE_POLICY P11. Every proposal below passes through the full public pipeline during the Genesis Window - there is no seed bypass. FOUNDER: verify every digit against the source before opening the window; entity IDs pending registry confirmation.

tier_1_individual_proposals.subject: SK-ENT-000011
tier_1_individual_proposals.label_hint: hyperfine transition frequency of Cs-133 (9192631770 Hz)

tier_1_individual_proposals.subject: SK-ENT-000012
tier_1_individual_proposals.label_hint: luminous efficacy of 540 THz radiation (683 lm/W)

tier_2_batch_proposal.description: Complete CODATA 2022 recommended values (~350 constants) via one batch proposal (P11). Reviewed object: the ingestion script + the pinned source edition + spot checks. Each fact gets its own record, ID, and dispute window.
tier_2_batch_proposal.ingestion_script: tools/ingest_codata.py (to be written; audit target of the batch review)

tier_3_condition_bearing.subject: SK-ENT-000005

conditions.note: ITS-90 is entity-valued; v1 conditions are quantity-only, so this requirement cannot be expressed yet. FOUNDER DECISION 2026-07-17: propose and HOLD IN REVIEW (P7) as a living exhibit - the citable refusal demonstrates the gate; never seal with a placeholder condition. Seals only after a governance record activates the entity condition type.

tier_3_condition_bearing.label_hint: boiling temperature of water at standard pressure - exercises Dimension D

tier_4_deliberate_rejection.description: One proposal designed to be permanently refused, demonstrating that refusals are principled, citable, and visible forever. FOUNDER DECISION 2026-07-17: a boiling-temperature proposal missing its mandatory pressure condition - deterministic, honest, refused at the intake gate citing the mandatory-conditions ruleset. No planted value errors: the scoreboard rewards real catches only.
